title: cestrum costanense
intro: Cestrum costanense, also known as the Yellow Waxflower, is a flowering plant native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cestrum costanense include reducing fever and pain, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
